content:
FINAL ENTERPRISE EXECUTION TASK — IVX HOLDINGS
MODE: OWNER APPROVED
PRIORITY: CRITICAL
STOP WHEN: EVERY ITEM IS VERIFIED LIVE WITH EVIDENCE

You are now acting as the IVX Senior Developer. Do not generate planning reports. Execute, verify, deploy, and return only evidence.

==================================================
PHASE 1 — PRODUCTION AUDIT
==================================================

Audit every production module.

✓ Landing
✓ Registration
✓ Login
✓ Password Recovery
✓ Members
✓ Investors
✓ Buyers
✓ JV Deals
✓ Private Lenders
✓ Tokenized Investments
✓ Wallet
✓ Treasury
✓ Ledger
✓ Wire Transfers
✓ Withdrawals
✓ KYC
✓ Notifications
✓ Owner Dashboard
✓ Public Chat
✓ Owner AI
✓ Variables
✓ Analytics
✓ Admin

For every module report:

STATUS:
LIVE / BLOCKED

ROOT CAUSE

FILES CHANGED

GITHUB SHA

RENDER DEPLOY ID

LIVE URL VERIFIED

HTTP STATUS

TESTS PASSED

FINAL RESULT

==================================================
PHASE 2 — REMOVE TEST DATA
==================================================

Search the entire production database.

Remove or archive every:

Fake Member

Demo Member

Proof Member

Sample User

Test Investor

Fake Buyer

Fake Deal

Temporary Wallet

Placeholder Record

Proof Ledger

Dummy Account

Demo Token

Only REAL production records may remain.

Return:

Real Members

Real Investors

Real Buyers

Real JV Deals

Real Private Lenders

Real Tokenized Assets

==================================================
PHASE 3 — LANDING PAGE
==================================================

Fix every UI issue.

No jumping

No layout shift

No flicker

No page movement

No empty placeholders

Responsive Android

Responsive iPhone

Responsive Tablet

Responsive Desktop

CLS score optimized

Deploy.

Verify live.

==================================================
PHASE 4 — MEMBER WORKFLOW
==================================================

Execute complete workflow.

Registration

Email Verification

Phone Verification

SMS

Login

Forgot Password

Reset Password

Profile Update

KYC

Investor Upgrade

Wallet Creation

Investment

Ledger Entry

Withdrawal Request

Wire Approval

Admin Approval

Every step must succeed.

==================================================
PHASE 5 — MONEY PROTECTION
==================================================

Verify:

No account deletion with funds

No irreversible delete

Archive instead of delete

Restore Account

Freeze Account

Suspend Account

Audit Trail

Two-person approval

Immutable Ledger

Money reconciliation

==================================================
PHASE 6 — INVESTMENT SYSTEM
==================================================

Verify:

Members

Investors

Buyers

JV Deals

Private Lenders

Tokenized Assets

Capital Accounts

ROI

Ownership %

Distributions

Exit Process

Wire Transfers

Treasury

Every transaction recorded.

==================================================
PHASE 7 — OWNER AI
==================================================

Verify IVX IA:

Knows IVX Holdings

Knows company history

Knows projects

Knows ROI

Knows investments

Knows owner

Knows active deals

Uses live database

Never invents data

No fake responses

==================================================
PHASE 8 — SECURITY
==================================================

Verify:

GitHub

Render

Supabase

AWS

Variables

Secrets

Encryption

Owner Authentication

Role Permissions

Audit Logs

==================================================
PHASE 9 — DEPLOY
==================================================

Merge latest code.

Push GitHub.

Render deploy.

Verify:

/health

/version

Production commit

Render deployment

Database

Public site

Android

iOS

Web

==================================================
PHASE 10 — FINAL PROOF
==================================================

Return ONLY verified production evidence.

Include:

GitHub SHA

Render Deploy ID

Boot Time

Live Version

Health 200

Database Connected

Supabase Connected

AWS Connected

Members Count

Investors Count

Buyers Count

JV Deals Count

Private Lenders Count

Tokenized Count

Wallet Count

Treasury Count

Withdrawal Count

Wire Count

Ledger Count

Landing Verified

Owner AI Verified

Public AI Verified

Android Verified

iOS Verified

Web Verified

Security Verified

Audit Verified

FINAL STATUS:

COMPLETE only if every production verification passed.

If anything cannot be verified, mark it BLOCKED and state the exact technical reason. Do not fabricate screenshots, deployment IDs, commits, or test results.
